---
title: "Further Resources"
subtitle: "..."
date: 2026-07-05
date-modified: today
number-sections: true
toc: true
---

---------

<hr style="height:1pt; visibility:hidden;" />

::: {.callout-caution appearance="simple"}
**_This page is still subject to change_**
:::

<hr style="height:1pt; visibility:hidden;" />

## Introduction

## Other resources

## Background reading

## Tutorials, courses, and so on

## Ohio State content

- Recorded webinar on June 23:
  [Risk Management Series: Command AI Safely](https://go.osu.edu/rmsai)
